tagline: Placing North American players on professional courts overseas.
subtagline: FIBA-licensed pathways. EuroBasket-eligible competition. A direct route from your hometown gym to a professional men's roster in Malta.

events.name: OPL Overseas Training Camp
events.blurb: Seven days of professional-level training, film, and exposure on the island that hosts FIBA-sanctioned competition.

events.name: OPL Summer League
events.blurb: Summer runs to keep placement-track players sharp and in front of scouts ahead of the overseas season.

events.name: OPL League Combine
events.blurb: A measured, scouted combine feeding the North American Scouting Combine pipeline. Date to be announced.

perks: VISA support for stays over 90 days

camp_includes.title: Accommodations
camp_includes.detail: 7 days of lodging on the island.

camp_includes.title: Food
camp_includes.detail: Two meals per day throughout the camp.

channels.title: Direct Player Placement
channels.detail: Sign directly with a professional men's team in Malta through our Valletta BC partnership — FIBA-licensed and EuroBasket-eligible.

channels.title: Overseas Tours
channels.detail: Structured overseas trips that put North American players inside live professional environments, training, and competition.

channels.title: North American Scouting Combine
channels.detail: Scouted, measured combine events that identify and develop players for overseas placement.
